title: Dummy Post: CNN Error Analysis Beyond Accuracy
excerpt: A synthetic post to test article cards for computer vision evaluation and failure-analysis content.

content.value: Accuracy compresses many failure modes into one number. Error analysis re-expands them into something actionable.

| Slice | Why inspect it |
|---|---|
| Low light | Tests robustness to weak signal |
| Occlusion | Reveals localization failure |
| Edge cases | Highlights blind spots |
